sourceMovie.title: Mary Poppins Returns
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Mary Poppins Returns for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a family rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Rob Marshall keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The fantasy and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Mary Poppins Returns clicked for you, Mary Poppins (1964) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Mary Poppins Returns?
faq.answer: Try Mary Poppins, Nanny McPhee, Nanny McPhee and the Big Bang—each shares DNA with Mary Poppins Returns while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Mary Poppins Returns?
faq.answer: Mary Poppins Returns (2018) is best described as Fantasy, Family, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Mary Poppins Returns part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Mary Poppins Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
